Class AudioManager

java.lang.Object
com.comp2042.controller.manager.AudioManager
public class AudioManager extends Object
Manages all audio operations for the game. Follows Single Responsibility Principle - only handles audio playback.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    AudioManager()

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    dispose()
    Cleans up resources when audio manager is no longer needed.

    getVolume()
    Gets the current volume level.

    Initializes all audio players by loading audio files.
    boolean

    Checks if audio is currently muted.
    void

    Plays the button click sound.

    Plays the countdown sound.

    Plays the game music (looping).

    Plays the game over sound.

    Plays the garbage sound.

    Plays the hover sound.

    Stops all audio playback.

    Stops the game music.

      public AudioManager()

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initializes all audio players by loading audio files.

    • setVolume

      public void setVolume(double volume)
      Sets the volume for all audio players.
      Parameters:
      volume - Volume level between 0.0 and 1.0

    • getVolume

      public double getVolume()
      Gets the current volume level.
      Returns:
      Current volume between 0.0 and 1.0

    • toggleMute

      public boolean toggleMute()
      Toggles mute state.
      Returns:
      true if now muted, false if now unmuted

    • isMuted

      public boolean isMuted()
      Checks if audio is currently muted.
      Returns:
      true if muted, false otherwise

    • playCountdown

      public void playCountdown()
      Plays the countdown sound.

    • playGameMusic

      public void playGameMusic()
      Plays the game music (looping).

    • stopGameMusic

      public void stopGameMusic()
      Stops the game music.

    • playGameOver

      public void playGameOver()
      Plays the game over sound.

    • playLineClear

      public void playLineClear()
      Plays the line clear sound.

    • playMainMenuMusic

      public void playMainMenuMusic()
      Plays the main menu music (looping).

    • stopMainMenuMusic

      public void stopMainMenuMusic()
      Stops the main menu music.

    • playWinner

      public void playWinner()
      Plays the winner sound.

    • playClickButton

      public void playClickButton()
      Plays the button click sound.

    • playGarbage

      public void playGarbage()
      Plays the garbage sound.

    • playHover

      public void playHover()
      Plays the hover sound.

    • playLevelUp

      public void playLevelUp()
      Plays the level up sound.

    • stopAll

      public void stopAll()
      Stops all audio playback.

    • dispose

      public void dispose()
      Cleans up resources when audio manager is no longer needed.
